title: Remembrance in Poland: UK and Commonwealth Services 2025/2026
body: "The UK Embassy in Poland invites you to attend Commonwealth Services of Remembrance at war cemeteries and memorials across the country.  These services honour all those from the Commonwealth of Nations who gave their lives at sea, on land and in the air during the First and Second World Wars. We also pay tribute to the courageous members of the Polish armed forces who fought and died defending their homeland and serving alongside their Commonwealth allies abroad.  Dates of the services:     City Date Time   Lidzbark Warmiński Commonwealth War Cemetery 4 November 2025 10:40am   Malbork Commonwealth War Cemetery 5 November 2025 10:40am   Kraków Commonwealth War Cemetery (Rakowicki Cemetery) 7 November 2025 10:40am   Warsaw RAF Liberator Memorial Stone, Skaryszewski Park 9 November 2025 10:40am   Poznan Commonwealth War Cemetery March 2026 (date and time to be confirmed)    "
